contract: Show severity, evidence, and next action without decorative layout.
List local artifacts with clear type and path.
Keep the local review center dense, readable, evidence-focused, and free of decorative controls.

Show exactly three ordinary destinations: 確認 (confirm), 進行中 (running), and 設定 (settings); keep Regression, Evidence, Findings, and Advanced reachable through an explicit details group without removing their existing behavior.

Summarize 準備 (prepare), 確認 (review), 判断 (decide), 再確認 (recheck), and 完了 (complete) from current website-review truth only; never attach the completion stepper to intake-only preparation, simulate progress, findings, recheck results, or completion, and expose the current stage with aria-current=step.

Map the titles 大切な改善点を知りたい, 改善点を詳しく洗い出したい, and 重要な判断の前に念入りに確かめたい plus the short labels 大切な改善点を確認, 詳しく確認, and 念入りに確認 to standard, deep, and xhigh while preserving the exact canonical effort in the existing proposal request and never implying provider or browser execution.
Keep one current goal, one primary safe action, adjacent truthful status, and one result or empty state in the ordinary workspace; route technical details to the retained detail destinations.

Before every external AI send, prioritize what will be sent, the user-facing service/model destination, and the TraceCue review method; place provider-native effort in secondary AI details, require explicit agreement, and do not provide an ordinary setting that disables this protection.
Explain real AI-assisted review progress as a short sequence of user-understandable steps; allow the page to be left without losing work and never show invented timers, percentages, or completion.
Order evidence-backed improvements by priority, explain their user impact in plain language, and let the user choose 修正する, 今回は見送る, or 相談して決める without exposing commands or provider internals.

Use one continuous prototype-style form for display language, default review screen, plain-language automated checks, AI suggestions, a compact user-facing AI service/model summary with explicit availability refresh and change actions, provider-native effort under secondary AI details, and mandatory external-send confirmation; 設定を保存 applies the general settings atomically, while a changed AI choice uses one nearby explicit apply action with conflict recovery; text-link actions keep at least a 44 by 44 pixel touch area on mobile.
Show successful inline feedback with the ordinary 1px line border on every side and the success_soft background; do not use a thick colored leading border.

Offer one New review form for website, video, image, document, and saved browser-check result; make video URL capability inspection network-free and URL-first, keep local-video rights and retention choices explicit, use the prototype one-line purpose input, keep desktop footer actions grouped at the inline end, use URL input or the browser file picker/drag-and-drop, hide original file names after selection, and never accept arbitrary local paths.

Show safe source-specific image, document, or automated-check facts; distinguish prepared evidence from completed review; retain total, pass, fail, timeout, and skipped counts; use danger for failure or timeout, warning for missing or empty evidence, and success only for a nonempty passing result; prevent same-form resubmission after success; retain existing results with one retry action when refresh fails; keep text status visible on mobile; sort all review types newest first; format dates in the selected locale; and mirror directional symbols in RTL.

Show AI suggestions available, setup needed, or unavailable with the selected user-facing service and model plus a safe next action; keep internal provider/adapter ids, endpoints, credentials, executable paths, commands, hashes, fingerprints, and raw discovery output out of ordinary UI, and offer direct Open AI settings and Continue without AI actions when setup is needed.

Use server-issued opaque options to choose a user-facing AI service and model only when alternatives exist; keep provider-native effort in a collapsed AI details disclosure, keep TraceCue standard/deep/xhigh visibly separate, refresh availability only by explicit action, and never expose or accept credentials, endpoints, executable paths, commands, or raw provider controls.
Explain the truthful saved state and expose only the recovery action that is safe for that state; uncertain external dispatch offers status checking and never an automatic or duplicate retry.
Open the packaged local Control Center with no build step, reuse one healthy workspace instance, and show the loopback URL when the operating system cannot open a browser.
Show local validation failures without exposing full source text or command strings.
Make local-only, no-provider, no-upload, no-shell, and gate-neutral boundaries visible near source intake.
Summarize generated local proposal artifacts by count and type while hiding paths in the normal UI.
Use the prototype-style setting row and the shared save action to change Control Center display language only; never translate source evidence, provider text, or generated reviews.
Keep fixed-path persistence and locale internals in backend and CLI contracts; do not expose storage paths, locale codes, direction, or translation state on the ordinary settings page.
Keep detailed Playwright Test evidence, import, and CI policy behavior outside the ordinary settings page while preserving the existing backend, CLI, API, and read-model contracts.
Render compact non-engineer Playwright Test review material from the read model without raw artifact viewers, run buttons, CI triggers, provider controls, or gate effects.

Render one prototype-style Playwright Test setting row with a short purpose label and explanation; saving changes mode only, never runs browsers, contacts CI, or mutates review gates, and local_run remains CLI-only.
Fetch a named finished CI artifact through read-only gh after explicit confirmation; never trigger or modify CI.
Suggest, approve, summarize, and explicitly fetch from one approved GitHub Actions artifact policy without dropping target policy, commit SHA, lookup limit, or max-age fields; never trigger CI.
